text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: ...I have my first dream of the year.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Big Bro... It's almost time to say goodbye.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Big Sis... It's almost time to say goodbye.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
There's nothing left for me to accomplish in this
country. So... I've gotta go!
choice_data_list: Go where?!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
To a country longing for my never-ending supply
of cuteness.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: In other words... the whole world! ♪
choice_data_list: Curren! Wait!
Curren! Wait!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Cuteness pours down like rain after a drought...
I'm sure it'll find its way to you again someday...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I'll never forget the time we spent together. I
hope you won't forget me either. ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I'll never forget the time we spent together. I
hope you won't forget me either. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That's when I wake up. My first dream of the year
is all about Curren Chan. I get the feeling this is
going to be quite a year.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Curren Chan invites me to visit a shrine with her
to celebrate New Year's.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Happy New Yeeear! I'm so glad we get to start
the year together! ♪
choice_data_list: I totally get what you mean...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Happy New Yeeear! I'm so glad we get to start
the year together! ♪
choice_data_list: I totally get what you mean...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hm? What's with the weird answer?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hm? What's with the weird answer?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Anyway, what's your New Year's wish?
choice_data_list: Uh...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: C'mon. I already know.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: It's got something to do with me, hasn't it? ♪
choice_data_list: ...Yep!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: It's got something to do with me, hasn't it? ♪
choice_data_list: ...Yep!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Curren Chan is finally about to start her senior
year. I was planning on wishing for her growth and
success.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Haha! ♪ Then I'll make it come true for you. What
do you want?
choice_data_list: I want you to stay healthy.
I want you to be strong.
I want you to have all kinds of strengths.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Haha! ♪ Then I'll make it come true for you. What
do you want?
choice_data_list: I want you to stay healthy.
I want you to be strong.
I want you to have all kinds of strengths.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Is that all?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I kinda figured you'd want me to be stronger or
faster or something.
choice_data_list:
Well, all of that will come naturally if you're
healthy.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hehe. ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
So you got multiple wishes all rolled into one,
huh? Just how greedy and cunning are you?! But I
won't lie...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
So you got multiple wishes all rolled into one,
huh? Just how greedy and cunning are you?! But I
won't lie...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I don't hate that about you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This puts Curren Chan in a good mood, and we
leisurely stroll around the shrine after.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hmmm...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: So, like...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hi-yaaah!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: ...This?
choice_data_list: No, not like that!
No, not like that!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Haha, I'm just kidding. ♪ You want me to be
stronger all around, right?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I've got a big race coming up, so I wanna get
stronger too.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: We're a team though, so we've both gotta work hard! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: We're a team though, so we've both gotta work hard! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: You mean, like... in addition to being cute, right?
choice_data_list: ...Y-yes?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hm... Oh! I might already have some!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Close your eyes...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Close your eyes...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
"You are my cute princess. Someday, I promise to
come for you..."

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Finished! ♪
choice_data_list: Where'd that deep voice come from?!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hehe. That's a secret! ♪ But this might be fun!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I should start brainstorming some new
strengths! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At Curren Chan's request, we stop by karaoke on
the way home from our shrine visit to discuss her
plans for this year.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I hereby announce the start of Project "Curren
Chan's Cutie ♪ Derby"!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems Curren Chan is trying to coordinate some
strange project.
choice_data_list: What is that exactly?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Allow me to explain!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Remember how I showed you all my potential
rivals at the end of last year?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Now that she mentions it, she did tell me about
all the runners who are both popular on social
media and good sprinters.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
But I think just running against them would be
kind of a waste.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I wanna create the most hyped-up event in sprint—no—in racing history! I want everyone to agree that sprints are the best!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
That's where Project Cutie ♪ Derby comes in! It
links social media and races together!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Here's the pitch. "Battle of the Influencers! Put
Your Likes on the Line and Take On Curren
Chan!"
choice_data_list: Put your "likes" on the line?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, likes. You know! On all the social media
platforms, when you think something is cool,
interesting, or funny or whatever, you "like" it.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
So basically, everyone who has the most followers
on each platform will battle with their likes!
Check the handout I gave you for more details.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The rules are simple. We count the number of
likes everyone gets on things they post on their
accounts during the race period.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The number of posts and the posts' contents don't
matter. Anything submitted before the postrace
video goes up will be counted.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Then we'll count all of the likes that come in on
all of the posts until ten o' clock the next morning
and whoever has the most overall will be the
winner.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
In other words, the one with the most likes is the
one with the most eyes on her... and therefore the
most beloved runner!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
It'll put the spotlight on sprints while also
determining who's number one. Two birds with
one stone. Super easy to understand, right? ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Counting concrete numbers could indeed make it
easy to determine who's number one. However,
there's one thing that bothers me...
choice_data_list:
But wouldn't people with accounts on multiple
platforms have the advantage?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I've already thought about that. I know not
everyone has accounts on every platform like I
do.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
As a precaution, I'm planning to count each
platform separately!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
So only posts on Umatter will be counted toward
the Umatter winner. That's fair, right?
choice_data_list: I guess so...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In turn, having multiple accounts would then
make the competition more difficult. Before I can
point this out...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Listen up, Big Bro! I'm betting everything on this
plan!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Listen up, Big Sis! I'm betting everything on this
plan!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
If I'm going to walk the path of mastering
cuteness, I can't let anyone else take the number
one spot.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
With the whole world watching, I'm gonna race
straight to the top—and beyond the limits of
cuteness!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I suddenly remember how Curren Chan appeared
in my first dream of the new year.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Having achieved unified cuteness, she looked so noble... It was like she was radiating cute energy.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure you want me to concentrate on my races,
though, huh?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure you want me to concentrate on my races,
though, huh?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry. I won't let it affect my races. And...
this is something I need to do for myself. I won't
ask you to get involved.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: So—
choice_data_list: I'll help!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Really?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ever since I signed up to become her trainer, I've
been determined to see her utilize her cuteness to
become a champion!
choice_data_list: I know you can do it.
I know you can do it.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Ehehe. Thanks.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I just knew you'd say that.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I just knew you'd say that.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
By volunteering my services, I know I'll have a
more active role in the Cutie ♪ Derby. Looks like
I'll be counting likes soon enough. But before
that...
choice_data_list:
We have to start reaching out to participants as
soon as po—

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, no worries there. I've already gotten
permission from the academy and everyone
else. ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
We've worked out all the details, so the only
thing left to do now is letting our followers know.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I hope you're looking forward to everyone's
reactions too. ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I hope you're looking forward to everyone's
reactions too. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...Even though we've known each other for a
while, it still feels like she doesn't fully trust me.
For now, I should just focus on being prepared.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Curren Chan's Cutie ♪ Derby has begun!
